title: hieracium olympicum subsp. permulticeps
intro: Hieracium olympicum subsp. permulticeps, commonly known as the hawkweed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Hieracium olympicum subsp. permulticeps include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, reduce fever, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
